title: helianthemum pilosum f. farinosum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum f. farinosum, also known as Rockrose or Farinose Rockrose, is a plant species in the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum pilosum f. farinosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
